home.heroDesc: CETC Nanhu Institute is dedicated to building next-generation brain-inspired intelligence solutions. With advanced AI and ultra-low-power technologies, we deliver highly reliable product experiences for complex scenarios.
home.productsSubtitle: An intelligent device lineup built for extreme environments and demanding requirements
home.guardxCardDesc: Trigger on motion, stay on guard for months. A microwatt standby reconnaissance device designed for off-grid and offline environments, with on-device AI recognition.

home.placeholder2Desc: 360° situation awareness with radar-vision fusion, built to operate in harsh weather and complex environments.

aiOfficeBox.heroSubtitlePrefix: Use sensitive data that cannot go to the cloud,
aiOfficeBox.heroSubtitle: Built for government, enterprise, and confidential workplaces. Physical isolation, zero data leakage, and millisecond on-device inference. End cloud dependence — keep data on the desk and stay fully in control.
aiOfficeBox.heroCardDesc: 25×18×10cm desktop deployment, gigabit LAN only, ready out of the box

placeholderHero.title: Hero image (product render)
placeholderHero.desc: Recommended: a dark, premium tech background with a compact box render (showing LED status screen and a physical record button). Place it on a government/enterprise desk or in an intranet server room, with subtle “security shield / data loop / neural network” light effects.

placeholderHardware.title: Exploded view / cutaway
placeholderHardware.desc: Recommended: an exploded or cutaway render showing NPU, encrypted SSD, TCM module, fanless cooling, and ports, with clean technical callouts.

placeholderAgentDoc.title: Document intelligence UI
placeholderAgentDoc.desc: Recommended: a WPS-like editor with summary/keywords/translation side panel, with the AI OfficeBox next to the screen.

placeholderAgentKb.title: Knowledge base Q&A UI
placeholderAgentKb.desc: Recommended: chat-style Q&A with citations and retrieval results panel to emphasize traceability.

placeholderAgentMeeting.title: Meeting minutes UI
placeholderAgentMeeting.desc: Recommended: waveform + timeline transcript + key points + action items, highlighting one-click recording.

placeholderAgentCompliance.title: Confidential compliance UI
placeholderAgentCompliance.desc: Recommended: sensitive-term highlights, risk flags, structured extraction table, and audit log panel.

placeholderIndustryGov.title: Government services scene
placeholderIndustryGov.desc: Recommended: a government service hall or intranet office photo with subtle AI overlays and security marks.

placeholderIndustryFactory.title: Smart manufacturing scene
placeholderIndustryFactory.desc: Recommended: a production line/control room photo with anomaly detection boxes and HUD-style metrics.

placeholderIndustrySecurity.title: Security monitoring scene
placeholderIndustrySecurity.desc: Recommended: a monitoring center photo with on-prem alerts and target boxes, emphasizing “no cloud dependency”.

aiOfficeBox.heroImagePlaceholderDesc: Place a refined industrial-looking box with a small LED status screen and a physical record button, on a government/enterprise desktop or in a server room. The screen shows “Local LLM running”.
aiOfficeBox.advantagesSubtitle: With domestic AI chips and an on-device large model, it addresses the key pain point for high-security organizations: “want AI, but cannot use the cloud”.

adv1.title: Integrated hardware-software industrial design
adv1.desc: A premium industrial box design with a small LED status screen and a physical record button. No deployment, no tuning — ready out of the box for desks, teams, or intranet server rooms.

adv2.title: Text masking & unmasking engine
adv2.desc: Automatically masks names, locations, and sensitive codes during import. After drafting, authorized users can restore masked terms to the original text with one click, balancing safety and usability.

adv3.title: Local 8B model + RAG
adv3.desc: Built-in high-performance on-device model plus retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) for accurate document parsing, semantic search, multi-document comparison, and answer traceability (with citations).

adv4.title: Secure import via dedicated media
adv4.desc: Supports encrypted USB drives and dedicated secure disks. The system performs file verification, malware scanning, and permission control to keep data flows compliant.

adv5.title: Fine-grained access control & full auditing
adv5.desc: Role-based management and knowledge-base isolation. All operations — import, Q&A, drafting, masking/unmasking, and export — are fully logged to meet strict audit requirements.

aiOfficeBox.painTitle: Break the 3 shackles of intranet AI adoption
aiOfficeBox.painSubtitle: High-security organizations don’t reject AI — they simply can’t risk cloud usage and can’t deploy it smoothly on-prem.

pain1.problemDesc: Public-cloud AI requires network upload; confidential documents face inherent leakage risk during circulation.
pain1.solutionDesc: Remove WAN modules and keep data 100% local to cut leakage at the source.

pain2.problemDesc: When the network is off, cloud AI stops. Typical office PCs can’t reliably run large models locally.
pain2.solutionDesc: A neural-inspired NPU runs models smoothly without consuming PC resources, even fully offline.

pain3.problemTitle: Intranet data becomes an information silo?
pain3.problemDesc: Documents are scattered and hard to search. Single-point deployments struggle to share knowledge and capabilities.
pain3.solutionDesc: Cross-format semantic search breaks departmental walls and shares capabilities securely across the intranet.

aiOfficeBox.hardwareTitle: Fast. Minimal. Ultra-secure desktop AI terminal
aiOfficeBox.hardwareSubtitle: A lightweight but powerful hardware base that works on desks or in intranet server rooms, enabling offline inference with strict compliance.

spec1.title: ⚡ 160 TOPS compute
spec1.desc: High-performance neural-inspired NPU and inference acceleration for smooth 7B–13B edge models.

spec2.title: 🔋 <25W low power
spec2.desc: 12V supply, fanless and silent. Plug-and-play without server room retrofits.

spec3.title: 🛡️ End-to-end security
spec3.desc: Built-in TCM, SM2/SM4 standards, and full-disk encryption with a high-speed SSD.

spec4.title: 🔌 Physical isolation
spec4.desc: Gigabit intranet only. No Wi‑Fi module and no WAN path — eliminate “connectivity risk”.

aiOfficeBox.agentsTitle: Four lightweight office agents for intranet workflows
aiOfficeBox.agentsSubtitle: Out of the box: documents, knowledge base, meetings, and compliance — in one secure box.

agent1.title: Document intelligence
agent1.desc: Handle PDFs, scans, and mixed formats. Generate summaries, extract keywords, and translate in minutes.

agent2.title: Enterprise knowledge base
agent2.desc: Offline RAG that ingests policies and technical docs to become an always-on internal expert.

agent3.title: Meeting minutes & tasks
agent3.desc: Transcribe audio/video, summarize key points, and extract action items for faster execution.

agent4.title: Confidential compliance check
agent4.desc: For strict environments: structure sensitive files and validate confidential terminology and rules.

aiOfficeBox.archTitle: Hardware–software co-design with a four-layer security architecture
aiOfficeBox.archSubtitle: A complete chain from data ingestion to compute output, balancing endpoint security and domain-wide collaboration.
aiOfficeBox.archLayer3Value: Lightweight MoE model / Speculative decoding accelerator
aiOfficeBox.archLayer2Value: On-prem fine-tuning / Cluster management / RAG knowledge base
aiOfficeBox.archLayer1Value: OpenClaw box / TCM module / Physical isolation
aiOfficeBox.archDiagramMaaSDesc: Lightweight MoE model / Speculative decoding accelerator
aiOfficeBox.archDiagramPaaSDesc: On-prem fine-tuning / Cluster management / RAG knowledge base
aiOfficeBox.archDiagramIaaSDesc: OpenClaw box / TCM module / Physical isolation
aiOfficeBox.industryTitle: Beyond office work: an edge AI brain for every industry
aiOfficeBox.industrySubtitle: Not only an intranet office assistant, but a secure AI compute endpoint for edge and field scenarios.

industry1.title: Government services
industry1.desc: A dedicated on-prem “brain” for compliance and faster policy consultation and service guidance.

industry2.title: Smart manufacturing
industry2.desc: An “eagle eye” for production lines with real-time analytics and millisecond anomaly alerts.

industry3.title: Security & surveillance
industry3.desc: Run locally without cloud dependency for on-prem video analysis and alert decisions.

aiOfficeBox.roadmapTitle: Stepwise upgrades for every deployment stage
aiOfficeBox.roadmapSubtitle: From single-device to clusters and multi-agent collaboration — evolving with your business.

roadmap1.title: V1.0 Single-box office
roadmap1.desc: Best for single confidential desks. Offline operation for basic office AI and compliance checks.

roadmap2.title: V2.0 Intranet collaboration cluster
roadmap2.desc: Department deployment. Device monitoring, real-time KB sync, and distributed search across desks.

roadmap3.title: V3.0 Self-evolving agents
roadmap3.desc: Enterprise ecosystem. Multi-agent collaboration, on-prem fine-tuning/distillation, continuous capability upgrades.

aiOfficeBox.ctaDesc: Join the community with developers, industry users, and partners. Get product updates, docs, and roadmap access, co-create features, and connect for customization and integration.
aiOfficeBox.communityCardDesc: Connect developers, industry users, and partners to share the gains of on-prem AI transformation.
aiOfficeBox.scenariosSubtitle: Turn massive sensitive data into on-prem productivity

scenario1.title: Materials assistant for HQ/government departments
scenario1.desc: Draft work summaries, leadership reports, policy interpretation, and annual plans.
scenario1.b1: Convert large historical archives into an on-prem knowledge base for quick policy reference.
scenario1.b2: Generate a first draft of briefing materials with one click and cut drafting time significantly.

scenario2.title: Proposal & technical-solution assistant for institutes
scenario2.desc: Draft project proposals, technical solutions, milestone summaries, and acceptance materials.
scenario2.b1: Process sensitive technical data locally and protect core information with the masking engine.
scenario2.b2: Help researchers quickly extract technical routes and project outlines.

scenario3.title: Process document management for defense/sensitive project teams
scenario3.desc: Manage meeting minutes, test records, and issue lists produced over long project cycles. Keep materials inside the intranet, strengthen knowledge retention, and support traceability and auditing.

scenario4.title: Confidential meeting recording & minutes generation
scenario4.desc: For confidential meetings, closed bid evaluations, and key discussions. One-click recording with a physical button, then automatic transcription and structured minutes with action items.

aiOfficeBox.ctaTitleLine2: Secure AI OfficeBox solves “compliant efficiency in high-security environments”.

spiritualEyes.heroDvsCallout: DVS event camera identifies covert recording behaviors
spiritualEyes.heroIrCallout: IR camera detects hidden recording devices
spiritualEyes.heroImagePlaceholderDesc: Use a high-tech, deep-blue-tone product render or scenario composite with IR/DVS sensing effects.
spiritualEyes.pillarsDescSuffix: multimodal fusion architecture that replaces signal-based detection. With “device detection + behavior recognition”, it ensures the monitoring device itself has near-zero leakage risk from the physical layer.

feature1.title: Works offline, resists jamming
feature1.desc: Breaks the blind spots of signal-based detection and does not rely on Wi‑Fi, Bluetooth, or cellular signals. Even if a hidden device is in airplane mode, has no SIM, or the room uses a jammer, it can still be identified accurately.

feature2.title: Device + behavior double lock
feature2.desc: IR sensing captures optical device signatures; the DVS event camera detects actions like raising a phone, aiming, and pressing the shutter at millisecond-level. Fusion algorithms strike fast with extremely low false positives.

feature3.title: The monitor doesn’t leak
feature3.desc: Physical-level privacy protection. DVS outputs only dynamic pixel changes (contours and motion) and does not record HD static images or readable text, eliminating secondary leakage at the hardware source.

spiritualEyes.formsSubtitle: From fixed spaces to mobile work, covering different security levels and scenarios

pro.name: Hidden Guardian · Dome
pro.item3Value: 24/7 no-dead-angle monitoring, multi-device networking, and a room-wide anti-recording dome
pro.imagePlaceholderDesc: Show a fixed device installed on the ceiling or corner, emphasizing wide-angle coverage.

air.name: Hidden Guardian · Go
air.item1Value: Mini clip-on design (clip above screen, on folders, or carry with you)
air.item3Value: Plug-and-play with long standby, protecting against “behind-the-back recording” and “over-the-shoulder peeking”
air.imagePlaceholderDesc: Show a compact device clipped to a laptop screen or placed on a desk.

spiritualEyes.scenariosSubtitle: Targeted anti-leakage solutions for high-security spaces and behaviors

scenario1.title: Confidential office
scenario1.desc: Prevent insiders from bringing phones and recorders to secretly take photos or audio recordings.

scenario2.title: Confidential meeting room
scenario2.desc: Prevent meeting content, materials, and projection screens from being recorded, including hidden desk-level audio recording.
scenario2.risk1: Attendees raising phones to record slides

scenario3.title: Core R&D center
scenario3.desc: Prevent drawings, code, experiment data, and prototype information from being photographed and leaked.

scenario4.title: Server room & archive room
scenario4.desc: Continuously sense carried devices and suspicious behaviors in high-security rooms.

spiritualEyes.comparisonTitle: Multimodal anti-spy-shot protection, preventing secondary leakage
spiritualEyes.comparisonLeftDesc: Documents are clearly visible (secondary leakage risk)
spiritualEyes.comparisonRightDesc: Only motion contours, no readable text details

metric3.title: Recognition accuracy
metric3.desc: Works under complex lighting and occlusion

metric4.title: Low false alarms
metric4.desc: Filters daily actions like drinking or scratching

hero.badge: AIoT sensing-computing integrated ultra-low-power reconnaissance device
hero.title:
Motion-triggered alerts long-term guard
Smart recognition situation awareness
hero.desc: Designed for borders, perimeters, key-area defense, and temporary deployments. Combining “event-based vision sensing + on-device AI recognition + low-power evidence capture” to enable precise detection, alerts, and high-definition evidence for long-term unattended operation.
hero.cardSubtitle: All-weather smart reconnaissance, an invisible defense line

features.title: Core technical highlights
features.subtitle: Built for extreme outdoor and off-grid/offline environments

items.title: Event-driven sensing
items.desc: Alert only on motion. Powered by an advanced <highlight>DVS event camera</highlight>, it triggers only when objects move in view, filtering out irrelevant information.

items.title: Ultra-long standby
items.desc: <highlight>mW-level operation</highlight>. Supports long unattended duty; a single deployment can last for months without fear of power loss in the wild.

items.title: On-device AI recognition
items.desc: Edge intelligence. Built-in AI chip supports local detection of <highlight>people, vehicles, and drones</highlight>, reducing false alarms from wind and shadows.

items.title: Dual-mode evidence capture
items.desc: <highlight>Balance endurance and evidence</highlight>. A low-power DVS sensor stays on watch for pre-screening, then instantly wakes the HD RGB camera for evidence capture, ensuring both efficiency and quality.

camouflage.title: Ecosystem-level camouflage
camouflage.subtitle: Based on a tiny core module, it can expand into diverse camouflage forms for different scenarios
camouflage.moduleDesc: A highly integrated micro PCB with ultra-low-power image sensing and an on-device AI compute chip, roughly the size of a standard building block.

branches.title: Bionic rock sentry
branches.desc: The module is embedded into a highly realistic rock shell with tiny dual-lens apertures. Placed in mountains, deserts, or near border lines, it is hard to notice with the naked eye.

branches.title: Bionic deadwood sentry
branches.desc: Blends perfectly with deadwood and bark textures. Ideal for long-term covert guarding in forests, shrubs, orchards, and other densely vegetated areas.

dashboard.title: Situational awareness dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time linkage on the backend screen: deployment positions, status, and alert tracks at a glance

items.title: GIS map fusion
items.desc: Visualize sentry locations and dynamically draw intrusion tracks on the big screen.

items.title: Left alert panel
items.desc: Returns target snapshots in real time and pushes HD evidence within seconds.

items.title: Right alert trends
items.desc: Multi-dimensional dashboards for alert trends and target category statistics.

items.title: Device health monitoring
items.desc: Reports battery, signal strength, and online status; anomalies trigger alerts automatically.

nightVision.title: Brilliant at night, too
nightVision.subtitle: AI-ISP full-color night vision: accurately boxes targets even under extremely low light (≥ 1Lux)

scenarios.title: Typical scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Flexible, efficient, low-maintenance deployments for different security pain points

items.title: Long-term covert guarding at borders and in the wild
items.desc: Deploy along borders, uninhabited areas, mountains/forests, and outdoor corridors. Solves frequent maintenance and extreme power-supply challenges of traditional systems.

items.title: Perimeter protection for key and sensitive areas
items.desc: For airports, oil & gas pipelines, military restricted zones, and core warehouses. Continuous sensing and second-level alerts for people and vehicles.

items.title: Temporary deployment for public security and guarding
items.desc: Outdoor events, emergency tasks, and suspect vehicle/person tracking. Ready out of the box with quick magnetic or strap mounting for high mobility.

items.title: Evidence capture for vehicles and persons
items.desc: When a target enters the zone, it not only alerts but also instantly captures and returns key HD images (color, appearance, behavior) to support enforcement.

painpoints.title: Why choose GuardX?
painpoints.subtitle: Address three core pain points in outdoor and temporary deployments with a better solution

items.painTitle: Pain point 1: Short endurance of traditional cameras
items.painDesc: Deploying traditional cameras off-grid requires heavy solar panels or frequent battery replacement, leading to high maintenance costs and downtime due to power loss.
items.solutionTitle: GuardX solution: ultra-low power at mW level
items.solutionDesc: Event-driven wake-up keeps the device in ultra-low-power sleep when idle. With a compact battery, it can stay on duty for months.

items.painTitle: Pain point 2: Too much useless video, high transmission and review cost
items.painDesc: Continuous recording produces massive useless footage from wind and lighting changes, wasting 4G data and creating heavy manual review workload.
items.solutionTitle: GuardX solution: on-device AI filtering and precise pushing
items.solutionDesc: On-device AI with DVS pre-screening triggers RGB capture and recognition. Alerts are sent only when real threats (people, vehicles, drones) are detected, ensuring every returned frame is key evidence.

items.painTitle: Pain point 3: Difficult deployment in the wild and temporary scenes
items.painDesc: Traditional systems are bulky and require poles and wiring, making fast, covert, flexible deployment difficult in border forests and temporary security operations.
items.solutionTitle: GuardX solution: minimal, covert, portable deployment
items.solutionDesc: The core module is as small as a building block (≤ 80mm × 80mm × 80mm) and supports fast non-destructive installation. It can blend into rocks and deadwood for ecosystem-level camouflage and a truly invisible defense line.

comparison.title: Redefine outdoor and temporary deployment standards
comparison.subtitle: Smarter, more covert, and easier than traditional monitoring

rows.label: Evidence capability
rows.guardx: HD color snapshots; alert equals evidence
